# Age must be at least 21 (legal drinking age in many places)
        if self.age < 21:
            return False
        # Must have completed a bartending course
        if self.bartending_course_completed != 'yes':
            return False
        # Must not be currently a student (as they may need to focus on studies)
        if self.employment_status == 'student':
            return False
        # Must have at least a high school education
        if self.education not in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']:
            return False
        # All other attributes are not relevant for eligibility
        return True
